text:
The issue is clear — `getChainRpcUrl` returns the Alchemy URL which has domain restrictions. When the app runs in the sandbox preview (not vie.dev), the Alchemy key gets a 403. The `publicClient.getBalance` call fails silently (caught by `try/catch { /* ignore */ }`), so nothing shows. 

The fix: use the chain's own public `httpRpcUrl` for viem calls (which always works), and use Alchemy only for the `alchemy_getTokenBalances` special method. Also consolidate both `loadTokensForChain` and `loadBatchWalletTokens` into one shared function to avoid duplication. Let me rewrite cleanly:
